locations.name: 克鲁格国家公园
locations.summary: 克魯格國家公園（英語：Kruger National Park）是南非的國家公園，佔地19,485平方公里（7,523平方英里），是非洲最大的自然保護區之一。它是以南非共和國總統保罗·克鲁格名字命名。 历史 成立於1926年5月31日，成…

locations.name: Carl Jakob Sundevall
locations.summary: Carl Jakob Sundevall (22 October 1801 – 2 February 1875) was a Swedish zoologist.

locations.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
locations.summary: Sub-Saharan Africa is the areas and regions of the continent of Africa that lie south of the Sahara.

relations.subject: Wahlberg's eagle
relations.evidence: Wahlberg's eagle (Hieraaetus wahlbergi) is a bird of prey that is native to sub-Saharan Africa, where it is a seasonal migrant in the woodlands and savannas. It is named after the Swedish naturalist Johan August Wahlberg
